steps.title: Substitute the given values
steps.content: Use the given model $y=900ax^2$. The cable with circumference $1.50$ inches has breaking strength $3{,}037.5$, so substitute $x=1.50$ and $y=3{,}037.5$: $$3{,}037.5=900a(1.50)^2$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $12150$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $12150$.
